---
title: "\'The Little Maid\'s Text Book\'"
---

## \'The Little Maid\'s Text Book\'

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1880
**Genre:** verse
**Format:** poem in journal

**Publisher:** <i>Friendly Leaves</i> (December 1880), 268

### Notes

The poem is signed C. M. Yonge

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
